name: Gouverneur Bancorp, Inc./MD/
business: Gouverneur Bancorp provides community banking services, primarily originating one- to four-family residential real estate mortgage loans, and also offers commercial real estate loans, construction loans, home equity loans, commercial loans, and consumer loans. It accepts retail deposits and municipal deposits through its subsidiary GS&L Municipal Bank. The bank serves individuals, families, businesses, and municipalities in Jefferson and St. Lawrence Counties, New York.

exposures.sentence: Our principal business consists of originating one- to four-family residential real estate mortgage loans and, to a lesser extent, commercial real estate loans, construction loans and home equity loans and lines of credit.

catalysts.event: Opened new loan production office in Potsdam, New York
catalysts.sentence: Consistent with this strategy, in April 2025, we opened a new loan production office located in Potsdam, New York.
